chunks.title: Wisdom on Boasting and Friendship
chunks.reason: A cohesive unit of wisdom sayings contrasting human pride with the value of honest reproof.

chunks.title: Wisdom on Contentment and Prudence
chunks.reason: Continues the theme of practical wisdom regarding satisfaction, location, and recognizing danger.

chunks.title: Warnings on Guarantors and Conflict
chunks.reason: A distinct section focusing on the risks of financial guarantees and a contentious spouse.

chunks.title: Wisdom on Mutual Growth and Testing
chunks.reason: A series of metaphors illustrating how people refine each other and how folly is tested.

chunks.title: Exhortation to Manage Flocks
chunks.reason: A concluding practical instruction on diligent management of livestock and wealth.
